findings.message: New redis-exporter service added with no corresponding Prometheus scrape job. The exporter exposes metrics on port 9121 but prometheus.yml has no job_name configured to scrape these metrics.
findings.suggestion:
Add a scrape_configs entry to infra/observability/prometheus/prometheus.yml to scrape redis-exporter metrics:
  - job_name: redis
    static_configs:
      - targets: ["redis-exporter:9121"]

findings.message: No scrape job defined for redis-exporter service. The redis-exporter was added to observability.yml but no corresponding scrape configuration exists in prometheus.yml to collect its metrics.
findings.suggestion: Add redis scrape job configuration to collect metrics from redis-exporter:9121
